description_long: This lounge set consists of a deep green upholstered sofa, a matching armchair, and a round coffee table. The sofa is long and rectangular with three back cushions and a single seat cushion, both of which are plush and slightly tufted. The armchair mirrors the sofa's design, featuring a single seat and back cushion, and both pieces have straight, boxy armrests. The coffee table has a circular glass top supported by a black metal frame and a lower wooden shelf, providing a modern contrast to the soft seating. The legs of the seating are short, dark, and slightly recessed, giving a floating appearance. The overall style is contemporary, with clean lines and a cohesive color palette suitable for urban parks, lobbies, or outdoor lounges.
description: A modern green lounge set with a long sofa, matching armchair, and a round glass coffee table, all featuring clean lines and contemporary styling.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of the sofa, the armchair to the right, and the round coffee table centered between them.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the sofa's depth, the armchair's side profile, and the coffee table's glass top and wooden shelf.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back sides of the sofa and armchair, with the coffee table in front.
description_view_3: Back corner view emphasizing the sofa's length, the armchair's back, and the coffee table's position relative to the seating.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three loose back cushions and a single long seat cushion on the sofa; one back and one seat cushion on the armchair; all cushions are rectangular and plush.
attribute_backrest_design: Straight, medium-height backrests with a flat top and no visible segmentation or headrests; backrests are slightly padded and match the seat cushions.
attribute_armrest_presence: Present; straight, boxy, and padded armrests at full seat height on both sofa and armchair.
attribute_leg_style: Short, straight, dark wooden legs, slightly recessed under the seating for a floating effect; simple and unadorned.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid green fabric with a subtle, smooth texture; minimal visible stitching and no decorative patterns or tufting.
